text:
— 

COMMENT: This field is new in October 2014 (it is not populated). This field only applies to Inpatient claims. 

This field is derived by accumulating the Claim IPPS Flexible Payment 7 Amount (CLM-IPPS-FLEX-PMT-7-
AMT) that is present on any of the claim records included in the stay (i.e., the sum of the claim IPPS 
flexible payment 7 amounts reported on the claims that comprise the stay).
